name: afdko-bin
title: afdko-bin
summary: Adobe Font Development Kit for OpenType (Binaries)
description:
Adobe Font Development Kit for OpenType (Binaries)
Tools used to make OpenType fonts by adding the OpenType-specific data to a
TrueType or Type1 font.
.
This package installs native binaries in AFDKO.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use afdko-bin because Adobe Font Development Kit for OpenType (Binaries).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use afdko-bin as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair afdko-bin with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `afdko-bin --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
